data.arabic_text: وَقَالَ صلى الله عليه وسلم: ((يَا عَبْدَ اللَّهِ بْنَ قَيْسٍ أَلاَ أَدُلُّكَ عَلَى كَنْزٍ مِنْ كُنُوزِ الْجَنَّةِ))؟ فَقُلْتُ: بَلَى يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ، قَالَ: ((قُلْ لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِاللَّهِ)).
data.english_text: (AAabdullah Ibn Qays  related that the Prophet  said to him: ‘ O ‘AAabdullah Ibn Qays, shall I not inform you of a treasure from the treasures of paradise?’ He  then said: ‘Say: (There is no might nor power except with Allah.))

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (AAabdullah Ibn Qays  related that the Prophet  said to him: ‘ O ‘AAabdullah Ibn Qays, shall I not inform you of a treasure from the treasures of paradise?’ He  then said: ‘Say: (La  hawla wala quwwata illa billah.))
